itinerary.title: Romantic Paris Honeymoon
itinerary.tagline: Eiffel Tower • Seine River Cruise • Montmartre • Versailles • Luxury Dining
itinerary.overview:
Eiffel Tower • Seine River Cruise • Montmartre • Versailles • Luxury Dining 05 Nights / 06 Days Romantic Paris Honeymoon Sanctuary SERIAL CODE: FR-002 TRAGUIN TOUR CODE: TRG-PAR-ROMANCE-2026 STATE / COUNTRY: France CATEGORY: Luxury Romantic Paris Honeymoon Package DURATION: 05 Nights / 06 Days Paris Exploration

TOUR OVERVIEW
Begin your lifelong love story in the most poetic city in the world. Our TRAGUIN curated Paris honeymoon retreat offers an unparalleled blend of classic French romance, world-class culinary experiences, and iconic landmark exploration. Designed for absolute comfort and privacy, this Romantic Paris journey guarantees unforgettable memories in the heart of the "City of Light".

WHY CHOOSE OUR ROMANTIC PARIS HONEYMOON?
Paris provides an iconic backdrop for honeymoons, featuring breathtaking architecture, charming cobblestone streets, and exquisite dining. Choosing TRAGUIN for your honeymoon ensures premium experiences, from private guided tours to intimate sunset cruises. Discover why Paris remains the dream destination for couples worldwide. THE IMMERSIVE DAY-WISE ITINERARY
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days France package (FR-002 / TRG-PAR-ROMANCE-2026): Eiffel Tower • Seine River Cruise • Montmartre • Versailles • Luxury Dining.

highlights.text: Day 01: ARRIVAL IN PARIS & SEINE RIVER DINNER CRUISE

days.title: ARRIVAL IN PARIS & SEINE RIVER DINNER CRUISE
days.description: Arrive in Paris, the City of Light. Your private transfer will escort you to your ultra-luxury hotel. Celebrate your first evening with a private dinner cruise on the Seine River, viewing iconic landmarks like the Eiffel Tower illuminated.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: EIFFEL TOWER & ARTISTIC MONTMARTRE
days.description: Visit the iconic Eiffel Tower with skip-the-line access. Later, explore the charming artistic district of Montmartre, visit the Sacré-Cœur Basilica, and enjoy a private artistic walking tour through its quaint streets.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: PALACE OF VERSAILLES
days.description: A private excursion to the majestic Palace of Versailles. Explore the royal apartments and stroll through the expansive, beautiful royal gardens in style, creating unforgettable memories.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: LOUVRE MUSEUM & SHOPPING
days.description: Discover artistic treasures at the Louvre Museum. Spend your afternoon enjoying leisurely luxury shopping along the Champs-Élysées, ensuring a perfect premium experience.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: LEISURE & ROMANTIC DINNER
days.description: Spend a relaxing day exploring local cafes, visiting charming patisseries, and enjoying a farewell candlelight dinner in a romantic garden restaurant.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Enjoy a final French breakfast before your TRAGUIN private transfer, completing your romantic Paris honeymoon.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

International airfare and France/Schengen entry visa processing fees
